overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a covered plaza featuring the 'Silverhand Booze' bar through to open city streets with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and dense neon signage reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with neon-lit bar and seating

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered plaza past the Silverhand Booze bar with neon purple seating and glass railings

notable_agents.action: sitting at a high table near the bar area

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'Silverhand Booze' on a curved building facade with yellow accent lighting
glowing purple bar stools arranged around high tables with neon tube bases
transparent glass barrier with metal handrail along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered indoor plaza dominated by the Silverhand Booze bar with its prominent red neon signage. The player walks past glowing purple bar stools and glass railings, with sparse NPCs visible in the background. The environment is artificially lit with ceiling lights and neon accents, creating a warm cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to street exit with elevated highway visible

events.description: exits the covered plaza into the open street with elevated highway structure becoming visible

agents.ego_description: moving toward the plaza exit where natural ambient light and the street outside become visible

entered.detail: multi-level concrete highway overpass with yellow trim and support columns
parked vintage-style cream yellow sports car near the exit point

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a transition corridor toward the plaza exit, where daylight and an elevated highway structure become visible ahead. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as the exit approaches, and a yellow sports car is parked near the transition point to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated highway and neon storefronts

events.description: ambient light increases as camera moves into more open street area with building reflections

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing various neon signs and storefronts with wet pavement reflections

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in the same direction as the player

entered.detail: tall vertical sign with Japanese characters and 'HOTEL' in blue neon lighting
futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades towering above the street
rain-slicked street surface reflecting neon lights in red and blue hues

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a city street beneath an elevated highway, with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon signs of hotels and shops. The environment transitions from sheltered to exposed, with towering glass skyscrapers visible in the distance and moderate pedestrian traffic on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with dense neon signage and towering commercial buildings

events.description: entering area with much denser and taller neon signage including the prominent Jacked and Coke building
crossing the wide street at a large intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide intersection toward a building with prominent 'Jacked and Coke' neon signage, surrounded by other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in the same direction toward the large building entrance

entered.detail: large art-deco style building with prominent pink neon 'Jacked and Coke' signage on the facade
wide yellow striped pedestrian crossing with red curb markings
massive vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on the building face

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and crosses a major intersection dominated by the massive 'Jacked and Coke' building with its bright pink neon signage. The scene features dense urban architecture with towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, wet streets reflecting the vibrant lights, and moderate pedestrian traffic crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a warm, neon-lit indoor plaza out toward the bright, open expanse of a futuristic city street. It begins inside a covered area dominated by the red neon signage of the Silverhand Booze bar, gliding past glowing purple bar stools and glass railings. As the camera moves forward, the artificial interior lighting begins to blend with natural light while passing through a transition corridor. The scene then opens toward the plaza exit, passing a parked yellow sports car as the view expands to reveal an elevated highway structure and the daylight of the city beyond.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban corridor into the heart of a sprawling, neon-drenched intersection. It begins beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, where wet pavement mirrors the vibrant glow of nearby hotel and shop signs. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from this covered passage to an exposed city street, revealing towering glass skyscrapers that loom in the distance. The scene then expands as the player approaches a major crossing, where the architecture becomes increasingly dense and dominated by massive digital billboards. Finally, the movement culminates in the crossing of a wide, yellow-striped intersection beneath the overwhelming pink neon radiance of the Jacked and Coke building.
